Who We Are

Built for Rare Legends

SMUGOLOT is more than a token — it's a community identity. Built on Solana's lightning-fast and low-cost network, SMUGOLOT fuses meme culture with genuine community-driven momentum. No gimmicks. No complicated mechanics. Just clarity, rarity, and social energy.

⚡
Zero Tax Trading
0% buy and 0% sell tax — every token you buy is entirely yours, no deductions.
🔒
Locked Team Allocation
Team tokens are fully locked with structured vesting to ensure transparency and reduce early sell pressure.
🟣
Powered by Solana
Sub-second transactions and near-zero fees on one of the fastest blockchains in the world.
👥
Community First
Everything is community-powered — from marketing to governance, growth is shaped by holders.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

SMUGOLOT is a community-driven meme token built on the Solana blockchain, designed to blend meme culture, digital identity, and long-term brand growth. It has a fixed supply of 100 million tokens with no buy or sell tax.
SMUGOLOT has 0% buy tax and 0% sell tax. Every token you purchase belongs entirely to you — no deductions, no hidden fees.
The total fixed supply is 100,000,000 (100 million) SMUGOLOT tokens. The supply will never increase.
Yes. The 5% team allocation is fully locked with structured vesting of 6–12 months, depending on the allocation category. This is designed to support transparency and reduce early sell pressure.
Solana offers sub-second transaction speeds and near-zero fees, making it ideal for a community-driven token with an active holder base. It's one of the fastest and most efficient blockchains available.
SMUGOLOT utility is centered on community participation and engagement — including reward campaigns, exclusive announcements, Solana-native partnerships, loyalty-style rewards, quests, branded drops, and community-led initiatives.
